'''radhopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycoparasite|mycoparasite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-dh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycoparasite|mycoparasite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| radhopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rædhepeth|rædhepeth]] || [[word:rædhepej|rædhepej]] || [[word:rædhepesh|rædhepesh]] || [[word:rædhepe|rædhepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:radhodhopoth|radhodhopoth]] || [[word:radhodhopoj|radhodhopoj]] || [[word:radhodhoposh|radhodhoposh]] || [[word:radhodhopo|radhodhopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:radhopoth|radhopoth]] || [[word:radhopoj|radhopoj]] || [[word:radhoposh|radhoposh]] || [[word:radhopo|radhopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:radhofpoth|radhofpoth]] || [[word:radhofpoj|radhofpoj]] || [[word:radhofposh|radhofposh]] || [[word:radhofpof|radhofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:radhopotho|radhopotho]] || [[word:radhopojo|radhopojo]] || [[word:radhoposho|radhoposho]] || [[word:radhopoko|radhopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:radhopoth|radhopoth]] || [[word:radhopoj|radhopoj]] || [[word:radhoposh|radhoposh]] || [[word:radhopo|radhopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:radhopothol|radhopothol]] || [[word:radhopojol|radhopojol]] || [[word:radhoposhol|radhoposhol]] || [[word:radhopokol|radhopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:radhopothotho|radhopothotho]] || [[word:radhopojojo|radhopojojo]] || [[word:radhoposhosho|radhoposhosho]] || [[word:radhopoko|radhopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:radhopothon|radhopothon]] || [[word:radhopojon|radhopojon]] || [[word:radhoposhon|radhoposhon]] || [[word:radhopokon|radhopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:radhopothoro|radhopothoro]] || [[word:radhopojoro|radhopojoro]] || [[word:radhoposhoro|radhoposhoro]] || [[word:radhopokoro|radhopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
